---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a reproducible bug in OpenClaw Guided Install
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: bobrapp
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages or stack traces from the browser console or server log.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots or screen recordings to help explain the problem.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **OS** | e.g., macOS 14.5, Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11 |
| **Browser** | e.g., Chrome 124, Firefox 126, Safari 17 |
| **Node.js version** | e.g., 20.11.0 |
| **npm version** | e.g., 10.2.4 |
| **OpenClaw version** | e.g., v2.1.0 |
| **Deployment type** | e.g., local dev, Render, Hetzner VPS |

## Host Target

Which host target were you using when the bug occurred?

- [ ] macOS (Local)
- [ ] DigitalOcean
- [ ] Azure VM
- [ ] Generic VPS
- [ ] Railway
- [ ] Render
- [ ] Fly.io
- [ ] Hetzner Cloud
- [ ] Oracle Cloud
- [ ] OVHcloud
- [ ] Tencent Cloud Lighthouse
- [ ] Alibaba Cloud ECS
- [ ] Vultr Cloud
- [ ] Kamatera
- [ ] N/A (web UI only)
- [ ] Other: _______________

## Severity

How severe is the impact?

- [ ] **Critical** — Data loss, security vulnerability, or complete inability to use the app
- [ ] **High** — Core feature is broken or significantly impaired
- [ ] **Medium** — Feature works but with notable issues or workarounds needed
- [ ] **Low** — Minor UI issue, cosmetic problem, or edge case

## Additional Context

Any other context: relevant log lines, network requests, configuration details, or links to related issues.

> **Security vulnerability?** Please do **not** use this template. Email [security@aigovopsfoundation.org](mailto:security@aigovopsfoundation.org) or use the [Security Vulnerability](?template=security_vulnerability.md) template instead.
